title: Junior Suite | Hotel Terraza del Pacífico
desc: Junior Suite for two with a King bed, private balcony and main-pool view in Playa Hermosa. Only two suites available.

Junior Suite

A top-floor suite for two, above the main pool

Main pool view | Upper floor | Only 2 rooms available

Capacity

2 persons

Size

32 m²

Beds

1 King Size

Description

One of only two Junior Suites at Terraza del Pacifico. From the upper floor you look straight over the lit main pool, and the King-bed room opens onto a private balcony — coffee in the morning, a drink at sunset. Built for couples.

Amenities
Air Conditioning
Flat Screen TV
Free WiFi
Hot Water Shower
Hair Dryer
Refrigerator and Minibar

✨ Includes spacious balcony with armchairs for relaxation
